440:         multitrack.on('canplay', () => {
441:           const storeState = useStore.getState();
442:           const realTime = storeState.currentTime + secondsPerBar;
443: 
444:           if (typeof multitrack.setTime === 'function') {
445:             multitrack.setTime(realTime);
446:           }
447: 
448:           adjustLayout();
449: 
450:           let maxDuration = 0;
451:           const wssList = multitrack.wavesurfers || [];
452:           wssList.forEach((ws: WaveSurfer) => {
453:             try {
454:               const wsTrackId = (ws as any).options?.trackId || (ws as any).options?.id;
455:               if (wsTrackId === 'metronome' || wsTrackId === 'placeholder') return;
456: 
457:               const matchingItems = multitrackItems.filter(item => item.trackId === wsTrackId);
458:               if (matchingItems.length === 0) return;
459: 
460:               const d = ws.getDuration();
461:               const item = matchingItems[0];
462:               const realStartPos = item.startPosition || 0;
463:               const userStartPos = realStartPos - secondsPerBar;
464:               if (d + userStartPos > maxDuration) maxDuration = d + userStartPos;
465:             } catch {
466:               // ignore
467:             }
468:           });
469:           setDuration(maxDuration);
470:         });
471:       } catch (err) {
472:         console.error('Multitrack initialization failed:', err);
473:       }
474:     })();
475: 
476:     return () => {
477:       disposed = true;
478:       if (multitrackRef.current) {
479:         multitrackRef.current.destroy();
480:         multitrackRef.current = null;
481:       }
482:     };
483:     // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
484:   }, [trackStructureHash, waveformQuality, bpm, setDuration, timeSignature?.[0], timeSignature?.[1], secondsPerBar]);
485: 
486:   useEffect(() => {
487:     if (!multitrack) return;
488: 
489:     // Remove redundant currentTime listener as we use pollTime for more control
490:     
491:     // Listen for clicks on individual wavesurfers to select phrases
492:     multitrack.on('click', (event: { id: string }) => {
493:       if (event?.id) {
494:         const state = useStore.getState();
495:         state.setSelectedPhraseId(event.id);
496:         
497:         // Also select the track
498:         for (const track of state.tracks) {
499:           if (track.phrases.some(p => p.id === event.id)) {
500:             state.setSelectedTrackId(track.id);
501:             break;
502:           }
503:         }
504:       }
505:     });
506: 
507:     // Listen for drag events to update the store
508:     multitrack.on('start-position-change', (event: { id: string; startPosition: number }) => {
509:       // wavesurfer-multitrack passes an object with { id, startPosition }
510:       // startPosition from multitrack is in RealTime (AudioContext clock)
511:       // We need to convert to UserTime (timeline position) for the store
512:       const id = event?.id;
513:       const realStartPosition = event?.startPosition;
514:       
515:       if (!id || realStartPosition === undefined) return;
516:       
517:       const state = useStore.getState();
518:       for (const track of state.tracks) {
519:         if (track.phrases.some(p => p.id === id)) {
520:           const phrase = track.phrases.find(p => p.id === id);
521:           if (!phrase) break;
522: 
523:           // FIXED: Convert RealTime → UserTime before storing
524:           // RealTime = UserTime + secondsPerBar + trackOffset
525:           // So: UserTime = RealTime - secondsPerBar - trackOffset
526:           const isMetronome = track.id === 'metronome';
527:           const trackOffset = track.offset || 0;
528:           const userStartPosition = isMetronome ? realStartPosition : realStartPosition - secondsPerBar - trackOffset;
529: 
530:           // Only update if the position actually changed to avoid infinite loops
531:           if (Math.abs(phrase.startPosition - userStartPosition) > 0.01) {
532:             console.log('start-position-change: RealTime=', realStartPosition, '→ UserTime=', userStartPosition, '(sPB=', secondsPerBar, 'offset=', trackOffset, ')');
533:             state.updatePhrasePosition(track.id, id, userStartPosition);
534:           }
535:           break;
536:         }
537:       }
538:     });
539:   }, [multitrack, secondsPerBar, setCurrentTime]);
540: 
541:   // Safe polling mechanism for currentTime that doesn't trigger excessive re-renders
542:   useEffect(() => {
543:     let isMounted = true;
544:     let animationFrameId: number;
545:     
546:     const pollTime = () => {
547:       if (!isMounted) return;
548:       
549:       if (multitrackRef.current && typeof multitrackRef.current.getCurrentTime === 'function') {
550:         try {
551:           const state = useStore.getState();
552:           const realTime = multitrackRef.current.getCurrentTime();
553:           const userTime = realTime - secondsPerBar;
554:           
555:           // Requirement 1 & 5: Clamp userTime to 0 for display and store, unless recording or pre-rolling
556:           const isPreRolling = state.isRecording || isPreRollingRef.current;
557:           const clampedUserTime = isPreRolling ? userTime : Math.max(0, userTime);
558:           
559:           // If we were pre-rolling and just passed Bar 1.1 (0s), hide the PRE bar
560:           if (isPreRollingRef.current && userTime >= 0 && !state.isRecording) {
561:             isPreRollingRef.current = false;
562:             if (multitrackRef.current) {
563:               multitrackRef.current.setRecordingMode(false);
564:             }
565:           }
566:           
567:           // Increase resolution to 100ms for smoother UI while reducing re-renders
568:           const stateTime = state.currentTime;
569:           const now = Date.now();
570:           if (typeof clampedUserTime === 'number' && !isNaN(clampedUserTime) && (Math.abs(clampedUserTime - stateTime) > 0.1 || (state.isPlaying && now - lastTimeUpdateRef.current > 100))) {
571:             state.setCurrentTime(clampedUserTime);
572:             lastTimeUpdateRef.current = now;
573:           }
574:           
575:           // Stop playback if we reached the end of the project duration
576:           const effectiveDuration = Math.max(60, state.duration);
577:           if (state.isPlaying && userTime >= effectiveDuration && effectiveDuration > 0 && !state.isRecording) {
578:             state.setIsPlaying(false);
579:             if (multitrackRef.current && typeof multitrackRef.current.pause === 'function') {
580:               multitrackRef.current.pause();
581:             }
582:           }
583:           
584:           // Apply envelope automation
585:           const currentTracks = state.tracks || [];
586:           const anySolo = currentTracks.some(t => t.isSolo);
587:           
588:           let itemIndex = 0;
589:           
590:           currentTracks.forEach(track => {
591:             let trackBaseVolume = track.volume;
592:             if (track.isMuted) trackBaseVolume = 0;
593:             if (anySolo && !track.isSolo) trackBaseVolume = 0;
594:             
595:             // Apply envelope
596:             let envVal = 1;
597:             if (track.envelope && track.envelope.length > 0) {
598:               const nodes = track.envelope;
599:               if (userTime <= nodes[0].time) {
600:                 envVal = nodes[0].value;
601:               } else if (userTime >= nodes[nodes.length - 1].time) {
602:                 envVal = nodes[nodes.length - 1].value;
603:               } else {
604:                 // Interpolate
605:                 for (let i = 0; i < nodes.length - 1; i++) {
606:                   if (userTime >= nodes[i].time && userTime <= nodes[i+1].time) {
607:                     const t0 = nodes[i].time;
608:                     const v0 = nodes[i].value;
609:                     const t1 = nodes[i+1].time;
610:                     const v1 = nodes[i+1].value;
611:                     const ratio = (userTime - t0) / (t1 - t0);
612:                     envVal = v0 + (v1 - v0) * ratio;
613:                     break;
614:                   }
615:                 }
616:               }
617:             }
618:             
619:             const targetVolume = trackBaseVolume * envVal;
620: 
621:             const wsList = multitrackRef.current.wavesurfers || [];
622:             const count = track.phrases.length === 0 ? 1 : track.phrases.length;
623:             
624:             for (let j = 0; j < count; j++) {
625:               const ws = wsList[itemIndex];
626:               if (ws && typeof ws.setVolume === 'function') {
627:                 const lastVol = lastVolumesRef.current.get(itemIndex);
628:                 if (lastVol === undefined || Math.abs(lastVol - targetVolume) > 0.001) {
629:                   ws.setVolume(targetVolume);
630:                   lastVolumesRef.current.set(itemIndex, targetVolume);
631:                 }
632:               }
633:               itemIndex++;
634:             }
635:           });
636:           
637:           // Handle sync loop
638:           const syncLoop = useStore.getState().syncLoop;
639:           if (syncLoop && userTime >= syncLoop.end) {
640:             if (typeof multitrackRef.current.setTime === 'function') {
641:               multitrackRef.current.setTime(syncLoop.start + secondsPerBar);
642:             }
643:           }
644:         } catch {
645:           // Ignore errors during polling
646:         }
647:       }
648:       animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(pollTime);
649:     };
650:     
651:     animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(pollTime);
652: 
653:     return () => {
654:       isMounted = false;
655:       cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrameId);
656:       try {
657:         if (multitrackRef.current) {
658:           const mt = multitrackRef.current as MultiTrack & { _layoutObserver?: { disconnect: () => void } };
659:           if (mt._layoutObserver) {
660:             mt._layoutObserver.disconnect();
661:           }
662:           const wssList = multitrackRef.current.wavesurfers || [];
663:           wssList.forEach((ws: WaveSurfer) => {
664:             try {
665:               // Skip placeholder track
666:               const wsId = (ws as any).options?.id || (ws as any).options?.trackId;
667:               if (wsId === 'placeholder' || wsId === 'metronome') return;
668:               
669:               if (ws.isPlaying()) ws.pause();
670:             } catch {
671:               // ignore
672:             }
673:           });
674:           multitrackRef.current.destroy();
675:         }
676:       } catch (e) {
677:         console.error("Error destroying multitrack:", e);
678:       }
679:     };
680:   }, [trackStructureHash, waveformQuality, secondsPerBar]);
681: 
682:   // Sync track heights dynamically
683:   useEffect(() => {
684:     if (!multitrackRef.current || !isReady) return;
685:     
686:     const expandedHeight = Math.floor(trackHeight * 1.5);
687:     const normalHeight = trackHeight;
688:     const currentMetronomeHeight = metronomeHeight;
689:     
690:     const wssList = multitrackRef.current.wavesurfers || [];
691:     let itemIndex = 0;
692:     
693:     (tracks || []).forEach(track => {
694:       const isMetronome = track.id === 'metronome';
695:       const isExpanded = track.id === selectedTrackId && !envelopeLocked && !isMetronome;
696:       const h = isMetronome ? currentMetronomeHeight : (isExpanded ? expandedHeight : normalHeight);
697:       
698:       const count = track.phrases.length === 0 ? 1 : track.phrases.length;
699:       for (let j = 0; j < count; j++) {
700:         // Skip placeholder track in wssList
701:         while (itemIndex < wssList.length) {
702:           const wsId = (wssList[itemIndex] as any).options?.id || (wssList[itemIndex] as any).options?.trackId;
703:           if (wsId !== 'placeholder') break;
704:           itemIndex++;
705:         }
706:         
707:         const ws = wssList[itemIndex];
708:         if (ws && typeof ws.setOptions === 'function') {
709:           // Only update if height actually changed to prevent flickering
710:           if (ws.options.height !== h) {
711:             ws.setOptions({ height: h });
712:           }
713:         }
714:         itemIndex++;
715:       }
716:     });
717:     
718:     adjustLayout();
719:   }, [selectedTrackId, envelopeLocked, isReady, tracks, adjustLayout, trackHeight, metronomeHeight]);
720: 
721:   // Sync moveLocked dynamically without recreating the engine
722:   useEffect(() => {
723:     if (!multitrackRef.current || !isReady) return;
724:     
725:     multitrackRef.current.setOptions({ moveLocked });
726:     
727:     // Update draggable state for all tracks
728:     if (multitrackRef.current.tracks) {
729:       multitrackRef.current.tracks.forEach((track: TrackOptions, i: number) => {
730:         // Only make actual phrases draggable
731:         if (track.id !== 'placeholder' && !String(track.id).startsWith('empty_')) {
732:           track.draggable = !moveLocked;
733:           
734:           // Update cursor visually
735:           if (multitrackRef.current.rendering && multitrackRef.current.rendering.containers) {
736:             const container = multitrackRef.current.rendering.containers[i];
737:             if (container) {
738:               container.style.cursor = moveLocked ? 'default' : 'grab';
739:             }
740:           }
741:         }
742:       });
743:     }
744:   }, [moveLocked, isReady]);
745: 
746:   // Sync selection state to regions dynamically
747:   useEffect(() => {
748:     if (!multitrackRef.current || !isReady) return;
749:     
750:     const wssList = multitrackRef.current.wavesurfers || [];
751:     const multitrackItems = (multitrackRef.current as { tracks: TrackOptions[] }).tracks || [];
752:     
753:     wssList.forEach((ws: WaveSurfer) => {
754:       // Get trackId from wavesurfer options
755:       const wsTrackId = (ws as any).options?.trackId || (ws as any).options?.id;
756:       
757:       // Skip placeholder track
758:       if (wsTrackId === 'placeholder' || wsTrackId === 'metronome') return;
759:       
760:       // Find matching item in multitrackItems by trackId
761:       const item = multitrackItems.find(item => item.trackId === wsTrackId);
762:       if (!item) return;
763:       
764:       if (item && !String(item.id).startsWith('empty_')) {
765:         const track = (tracks || []).find(t => t.id === item.trackId);
766:         const phrase = track?.phrases.find(p => p.id === item.id);
767:         
768:         if (phrase) {
769:           try {
770:             let regionsPlugin = null;
771:             try {
772:               regionsPlugin = (ws as { getActivePlugins?: () => unknown[] }).getActivePlugins?.()?.find((p: unknown) => p && typeof (p as { addRegion?: unknown }).addRegion === 'function');
773:             } catch {
774:               // ignore
775:             }
776:             
777:             if (!regionsPlugin && RegionsPlugin) {
778:               regionsPlugin = ws.registerPlugin(RegionsPlugin.create());
779:             }
780:             
781:             if (regionsPlugin) {
782:               const regions = regionsPlugin.getRegions();
783:               
784:               // If the region hasn't been created yet, create it now
785:               if (regions.length === 0) {
786:                 const addRegion = () => {
787:                   // Clear any existing regions just in case
788:                   regionsPlugin.clearRegions();
789:                   
790:                   regionsPlugin.addRegion({
791:                     start: 0,
792:                     end: ws.getDuration() || 9999,
793:                     color: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)',
794:                     drag: false,
795:                     resize: false,
796:                   });
797:                   
798:                   // Update styling immediately after creation
799:                   const newRegions = regionsPlugin.getRegions();
800:                   if (newRegions.length > 0) {
801:                     const region = newRegions[0];
802:                     const isSelected = phrase.id === selectedPhraseId;
803:                     
804:                     region.setOptions({
805:                       color: isSelected ? 'rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.2)' : 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'
806:                     });
807: 
808:                     // If duration wasn't available, update it when ready
809:                     if (!ws.getDuration()) {
810:                       const updateDuration = () => {
811:                         region.setOptions({ end: ws.getDuration() });
812:                       };
813:                       ws.once('ready', updateDuration);
814:                       ws.once('decode', updateDuration);
815:                     }
816:                   }
817:                 };
818: 
819:                 addRegion();
820:               } else {
821:                 // Region already exists, just update it
822:                 const region = regions[0];
823:                 const isSelected = phrase.id === selectedPhraseId;
824:                 
825:                 region.setOptions({
826:                   color: isSelected ? 'rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.2)' : 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)' // Light indigo overlay when selected
827:                 });
828:               }
829:             }
830:           } catch (err) {
831:             console.warn("Error applying regions plugin:", err);
832:           }
833:         }
834:       }
835:     });
836:     // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
837:   }, [selectedPhraseId, trackStructureHash, isReady]);
838: 
839:   // Sync track start positions dynamically without destroying the engine
840:   const startPositionsHash = useMemo(() => {
841:     return (tracks || []).map(t => (t.phrases || []).map(p => p.startPosition).join(',')).join('|');
842:   }, [tracks]);
843:   useEffect(() => {
844:     if (!multitrackRef.current || !isReady) return;
845:     
846:     let itemIndex = 0;
847:     
848:     (tracks || []).forEach(track => {
849:       if (track.phrases.length === 0) {
850:         itemIndex++;
851:       } else {
852:         track.phrases.forEach(phrase => {
853:           if (typeof multitrackRef.current?.setTrackStartPosition === 'function') {
854:             // Only set if the position is actually different to avoid infinite loops with the drag event
855:             // Unfortunately, wavesurfer-multitrack doesn't expose a getTrackStartPosition method,
856:             // so we rely on the React state being the source of truth.
857: 
858:             // We need to be careful here: if the user is actively dragging, we don't want to
859:             // fight the drag event. However, since the drag event updates the store, this useEffect
860:             // will run. Calling setTrackStartPosition with the *same* position the drag just reported
861:             // should be a no-op visually.
862: 
863:             // FIXED: Convert UserTime → RealTime for multitrack
864:             // phrase.startPosition is in UserTime (timeline), but setTrackStartPosition expects RealTime
865:             const isMetronome = track.id === 'metronome';
866:             const trackOffset = track.offset || 0;
867:             const realStartPosition = isMetronome ? phrase.startPosition : phrase.startPosition + secondsPerBar + trackOffset;
868: 
869:             try {
870:               perfLogger.log(6, track.id);
871:               multitrackRef.current.setTrackStartPosition(itemIndex, realStartPosition);
872:             } catch (e) {
873:               console.warn("Failed to set track start position:", e);
874:             }
875:           }
876:           itemIndex++;
877:         });
878:       }
879:     });
880:     // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
881:   }, [startPositionsHash, trackStructureHash, isReady]);
882: 
883:   // Sync zoom to multitrack (throttled)
884:   useEffect(() => {
885:     if (!multitrackRef.current || !isReady) return;
886:     
887:     // Throttle zoom updates to avoid UI lag
888:     if (Math.abs(lastZoomRef.current - zoom) < 0.1) return;
889:     
890:     const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {
891:       try {
892:         if (multitrackRef.current) {
893:           multitrackRef.current.zoom(zoom);
894:           // Also update options to ensure it sticks
895:           if (typeof multitrackRef.current.setOptions === 'function') {
896:             multitrackRef.current.setOptions({ minPxPerSec: zoom });
897:           }
898:           multitrackRef.current.setMainWidth([], multitrackRef.current.maxDuration, multitrackRef.current.options);
899:           lastZoomRef.current = zoom;
900:         }
901:       } catch (e) {
902:         if (e instanceof Error && e.message !== "No audio loaded") {
903:           console.warn("Zoom error:", e);
904:         }
905:       }
906:     }, 50); // Small delay for smoother slider interaction
907:     
908:     return () => clearTimeout(timeoutId);
909:   }, [zoom, isReady]);
910: 
911:   // Sync play state to multitrack
912:   useEffect(() => {
913:     if (!multitrackRef.current || !isReady) return;
914:     
915:     if (isPlaying && !multitrackRef.current.isPlaying()) {
916:       try {
917:         const state = useStore.getState();
918:         const currentTime = state.currentTime;
919:         
920:         // Requirement 4: Strictly for count-ins for playing/recording started with the playhead between 1.1 to 2.1
921:         // If we are between Bar 1.1 (0s) and Bar 2.1 (secondsPerBar), and not already recording, do a pre-roll
922:         const preRollMode = useStore.getState().preRollMode;
923:         if (currentTime >= 0 && currentTime < secondsPerBar && !state.isRecording && preRollMode === 'always') {
924:           multitrackRef.current.setTime(0); // Start at Bar 0 (RT 0)
925:           multitrackRef.current.setRecordingMode(true); // Show PRE bar
926:           
927:           // We need to track that we are in a playback pre-roll to hide the PRE bar later
928:           isPreRollingRef.current = true;
929:         }
930:         
931:         multitrackRef.current.play();
932:       } catch {
933:         // ignore
934:       }
935:     } else if (!isPlaying) {
936:       if (multitrackRef.current.isPlaying()) {
937:         try {
938:           multitrackRef.current.pause();
939:           multitrackRef.current.setRecordingMode(false); // Ensure PRE bar is hidden
940:           isPreRollingRef.current = false;
941:         } catch {
942:           // ignore
943:         }
944:       }
945:     }
946:   }, [isPlaying, isReady, secondsPerBar]);
947: 
948:   // Track properties (volume, mute, solo) are handled in the pollTime loop for maximum responsiveness
949: 
950:   const [debouncedBpm, setDebouncedBpm] = useState(bpm);
951:   const [debouncedTimeSignature, setDebouncedTimeSignature] = useState(timeSignature);
952:   
953:   useEffect(() => {
954:     const timer = setTimeout(() => {
955:       setDebouncedBpm(bpm);
956:       setDebouncedTimeSignature(timeSignature);
957:     }, 500); // 500ms debounce
958:     return () => clearTimeout(timer);
959:   }, [bpm, timeSignature]);
960: 
961:   // Sync BPM and Time Signature to multitrack options
962:   useEffect(() => {
963:     if (!multitrackRef.current || !isReady) return;
964:     
965:     if (typeof multitrackRef.current.setOptions === 'function') {
966:       multitrackRef.current.setOptions({
967:         bpm: debouncedBpm,
968:         timeSignature: debouncedTimeSignature
969:       });
970:       
971:       // Force a layout update to recalculate pre-roll pixels and scroll
972:       const container = document.querySelector('.multitrack-container');
973:       if (container) {
974:         multitrackRef.current.setMainWidth([], multitrackRef.current.maxDuration, multitrackRef.current.options);
975:       }
976:     }
977:   }, [debouncedBpm, debouncedTimeSignature, isReady]);
978: 
979:   // Generate click track buffer when BPM, Time Signature, or duration changes
980:   useEffect(() => {
981:     if (!audioContextRef.current || !isReady) return;
982:     
983:     const beatsPerSecond = (debouncedBpm || 120) / 60;
984:     const secondsPerBeat = 1 / beatsPerSecond;
985:     const secondsPerBar = secondsPerBeat * (debouncedTimeSignature?.[0] || 4);
986:     
987:     const targetDuration = Math.max(600, duration + 300);
988:     const targetBars = Math.ceil(targetDuration / secondsPerBar);
989:     const finalTargetDuration = targetBars * secondsPerBar;
990:     
991:     const metronomePhrases = (tracks || []).find(t => t.id === 'metronome')?.phrases || [];
992:     
993:     // Check if we need a completely new set of phrases (BPM or time signature changed)
994:     const needsNewPhrases = metronomePhrases.length === 0 || 
995:                            metronomeBufferRef.current?.bpm !== debouncedBpm || 
996:                            metronomeBufferRef.current?.timeSignature !== debouncedTimeSignature;
997:     
998:     if (!needsNewPhrases && metronomePhrases[0] && metronomePhrases[0].duration >= finalTargetDuration) return;
999:     
1000:     perfLogger.log(4);
1001:     
1002:     const fullBuffer = metronomeEngineRef.current!.generateClickTrackBuffer(
1003:       debouncedBpm,
1004:       debouncedTimeSignature,
1005:       finalTargetDuration
1006:     );
1007:     
1008:     metronomeBufferRef.current = { bpm: debouncedBpm, timeSignature: debouncedTimeSignature, buffer: fullBuffer };
1009:     
1010:     // Convert to WAV for WaveSurfer to render properly
1011:     const wav = audioBufferToWav(fullBuffer);
1012:     const blob = new Blob([wav], { type: 'audio/wav' });
1013:     const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
1014:     
1015:     const newPhrases = [{
1016:       id: 'metronome', // Consistent ID
1017:       url,
1018:       blob,
1019:       audioBuffer: fullBuffer,
1020:       startPosition: 0,
1021:       duration: fullBuffer.duration,
1022:       createdAt: Date.now(),
1023:       name: '',
1024:       color: '#718096',
1025:       volume: 1,
1026:       isMuted: false,
1027:       isSolo: false,
1028:       envelope: []
1029:     }];
1030:     
1031:     useStore.setState((state) => {
1032:       const newTracks = state.tracks.map(t => {
1033:         if (t.id === 'metronome') {
1034:           return {
1035:             ...t,
1036:             phrases: newPhrases
1037:           };
1038:         }
1039:         return t;
1040:       });
1041:       return { tracks: newTracks };
1042:     });
1043:   }, [debouncedBpm, debouncedTimeSignature, duration, isReady, tracks, secondsPerBar, waveformQuality, metronomeHeight]);
1044: 
1045:   const playPause = useCallback(async () => {
1046:     if (!multitrackRef.current) return;
1047: 
1048:     // Resume AudioContext on user gesture
1049:     if (audioContextRef.current?.state === 'suspended') {
1050:       await audioContextRef.current.resume();
1051:     }
1052: 
1053:     if (useStore.getState().isRecording) {
1054:       // If recording, stop recording which will also stop playback
1055:       if (recordingEngineRef.current) {
1056:         if (isPreRollingRef.current) {
1057:           recordingEngineRef.current.cancelRecording();
1058:         } else {
1059:           recordingEngineRef.current.stopRecording();
1060:         }
1061:       }
1062:     } else {
1063:       const newPlayingState = !isPlaying;
1064:       
1065:       // Start AudioWorklet early when going from stopped to playing
1066:       if (!wasPlayingRef.current && newPlayingState) {
1067:         console.log('playPause: transitioning from stopped to playing, initializing AudioWorklet early');
1068:         recordingEngineRef.current?.initializeForPlayback();
1069:       }
1070:       
1071:       // Stop AudioWorklet when going from playing to stopped
1072:       if (wasPlayingRef.current && !newPlayingState) {
1073:         console.log('playPause: transitioning from playing to stopped, stopping AudioWorklet');
1074:         recordingEngineRef.current?.stopForPlayback();
1075:       }
1076:       
1077:       wasPlayingRef.current = newPlayingState;
1078:       setIsPlaying(newPlayingState);
1079:     }
1080:   }, [isPlaying, setIsPlaying, setIsRecording]);
1081: 
1082:   const seekTo = useCallback((userTime: number, allowPreRoll = false) => {
1083:     if (!multitrackRef.current) return;
1084:     
1085:     const beatsPerSecond = (bpm || 120) / 60;
1086:     const secondsPerBeat = 1 / beatsPerSecond;
1087:     const secondsPerBar = secondsPerBeat * (timeSignature?.[0] || 4);
1088:     
1089:     // Manual seeking (from UI) should be clamped to 0.
1090:     // Internal seeking (like for recording pre-roll) can go negative down to one bar.
1091:     const finalUserTime = allowPreRoll ? Math.max(-secondsPerBar, userTime) : Math.max(0, userTime);
1092:     const realTime = finalUserTime + secondsPerBar;
1093: 
1094:     // Update store immediately for responsiveness
1095:     setCurrentTime(finalUserTime);
1096: 
1097:     try {
1098:       if (typeof multitrackRef.current.setTime === 'function') {
1099:         multitrackRef.current.setTime(realTime, true); 
1100:       } else {
1101:         // Fallback for older versions
1102:         const maxDuration = multitrackRef.current.maxDuration || 1;
1103:         multitrackRef.current.seekTo(realTime / maxDuration);
1104:       }
1105:     } catch (err) {
1106:       console.error('Seek error:', err);
1107:     }
1108:   }, [bpm, timeSignature, setCurrentTime]);
1109: 
1110:   const startRecording = useCallback(async (trackId: string) => {
1111:     if (!recordingEngineRef.current) {
1112:       console.error('RecordingEngine not initialized');
1113:       return;
1114:     }
1115:     await recordingEngineRef.current.startRecording(trackId);
1116:   }, []);
1117: 
1118:   const stopRecording = useCallback(() => {
1119:     if (!recordingEngineRef.current) return;
1120:     recordingEngineRef.current.stopRecording();
1121:   }, []);
1122: 
1123:   useEffect(() => {
1124:     useStore.getState().setSeekTo(seekTo);
1125:   }, [seekTo]);
1126: 
1127:   return {
1128:     containerRef,
1129:     multitrackRef,
1130:     playPause,
1131:     seekTo,
1132:     startRecording,
1133:     stopRecording
1134:   };
1135: }

(End of file - total 1135 lines)
</content>

_Thinking:_

Let me analyze the four bugs described in the plan and understand what needs to be fixed:

1. **Worklet `_flush()` returns wrong frame**: It returns `_recordingStartFrame` (physical capture start) instead of `_anchoredFrame` (the sync anchor passed from main thread).

2. **Rolling buffer empty on "none" mode**: `rollingOffset=0` because recording starts at the same frame as capture. Need to delay actual capture by `headLength` seconds for "none" pre-roll mode.

3. **`punchInUserTime_Real` uses absolute AudioContext time**: Need to compute `anchorFrame = floor((punchInUserTime + secondsPerBar) * sampleRate)` in main thread and pass it to worklet.
   
4. **No audio playback on recorded clips**: The `onAddPhrase` callback is nesting audio data inside `phrases[]` when it should be at the top level of `trackOptions`.

Now I'm looking at the worklet code to understand how the recording start frame is being set and how the anchor frame needs to be passed through instead. I see the distinction now—the anchor frame represents where the definitive audio starts in the timeline, which should be passed from the main thread rather than computed in the worklet. For the "none" pre-roll mode, I need to ensure the rolling buffer captures audio during the pre-roll period before recording actually begins, so when flushing, I can split the buffer at the recording start frame and prepend that head section to the audio data. For "continuous" pre-roll, the anchor is `punchInUserTime_Real - secondsPerBar * sampleRate`, while for "none" mode it's `punchInUserTime_Real` since recording starts immediately at the punch-in point. The worklet needs to receive this anchor frame, schedule recording to begin after a delay equal to `headLength` seconds to let the rolling buffer accumulate, then compute the final audio by combining the rolling buffer segments that fall before the recording start frame with the actual recorded data. I need to refactor the communication protocol between the main thread and worklet—instead of sending `punchInUserTime_Real` and boolean flags, I'll pass `anchorFrame` directly as a precise integer, eliminating floating-point precision issues and simplifying the recording logic. Recording gets delayed by `headLength` seconds, so for a 1-second head length at 44100 Hz, that's 44100 samples of pre-roll audio before recording actually begins. The anchor mark stays fixed while the recording start frame shifts forward, giving us that initial buffer of sound. So the worklet computes the recording start frame by adding the head length delay to the anchor frame. During the recording process, audio gets buffered into `_audioData` once recording is active. The flush operation identifies which rolling buffer chunks fall before the recording start frame and collects them as the pre-head audio, with any partial chunks at the boundary being split accordingly.

Looking at the current implementation, there's a disconnect: the message handler sets `_anchoredFrame` using the full `punchInUserTime_Real * sampleRate`, but this doesn't account for the head length offset that should be applied when scheduling the actual recording start.

The fix needs to compute the recording start frame as `anchorFrame + headLength * sampleRate` in the message handler. Additionally, `_flush()` should return the anchor frame itself rather than the recording start frame. For the pre-roll scenario, since the timeline is shifted backward by `secondsPerBar`, the playback position needs to be adjusted by subtracting that offset to get the correct real-time reference point. the main thread. I need to recalculate `punchInUserTime_Real` for "none" mode to place the anchor at the actual timeline position, then pass `headLength` as a parameter to the worklet so it can schedule recording to start after that delay. Looking at the current implementation, I'll add `headLength` as a parameter to the START_RECORDING message, restructure the audio data handling, and ensure the recording start frame is set correctly based on when audio capture actually begins.

426:   private updatePosition(time: number, autoCenter = false, isInternal = false) {
427:     const precisionSeconds = 0.05
428:     const isPaused = !this.isPlaying()
429: 
430:     this.currentTime = time
431:     this.rendering.updateCursor(time / this.maxDuration, autoCenter)
432:     this.emit('currentTime', time)
433: 
434:     // If this is a manual seek (not from the internal sync loop) and we are playing,
435:     // we need to update the sync base times to avoid "jumping back"
436:     if (!isInternal && this._isPlaying) {
437:       this.startAudioTime = this.audioContext.currentTime
438:       this.startMultitrackTime = time
439:     }
440: 
441:     // Update the current time of each audio
442:     this.tracks.forEach((track, index) => {
443:       const audio = this.audios[index]
444:       const duration = this.durations[index]
445:       if (!audio || duration === undefined) return
446: 
447:       const newTime = time - track.startPosition
448: 
449:       // If the position is out of the track bounds, pause it
450:       if (isPaused || newTime > duration) {
451:         if (!audio.paused) {
452:           audio.pause()
453:         }
454:         // Update currentTime even when paused so wavesurfer cursors update
455:         if (newTime >= 0 && newTime <= duration && Math.abs(audio.currentTime - newTime) > precisionSeconds) {
456:           audio.currentTime = Math.max(0, newTime)
457:         } else if (newTime < 0 && audio.currentTime !== 0) {
458:           audio.currentTime = 0
459:         } else if (newTime > duration && audio.currentTime !== duration) {
460:           audio.currentTime = duration
461:         }
462:       } else {
463:         // If the position is in the track bounds, play it
464:         if (!isPaused && audio.paused) {
465:           const webaudio = audio as WebAudioPlayer
466:           if (typeof webaudio.playAt === 'function' && this.audioContext) {
467:             audio.currentTime = Math.max(0, newTime)
468:             // If we are already playing, we should start immediately or at the scheduled time
469:             const startTime = newTime < 0 ? this.audioContext.currentTime - newTime : this.audioContext.currentTime
470:             webaudio.playAt(startTime)
471:           } else if (newTime >= 0) {
472:             audio.currentTime = Math.max(0, newTime)
473:             audio.play()
474:           }
475:         } else if (newTime >= 0 && Math.abs(audio.currentTime - newTime) > precisionSeconds) {
476:           // Only sync if the drift is significant to avoid glitches
477:           audio.currentTime = Math.max(0, newTime)
478:         }
479:       }
480: 
481:       // Unmute if cue is reached
482:       const isMuted = newTime < (track.startCue || 0) || newTime > (track.endCue || Infinity)
483:       if (isMuted != audio.muted) audio.muted = isMuted
484:     })
485:   }
486: 
487:   private onDrag(index: number, delta: number) {
488:     const track = this.tracks[index]
489:     if (this.options.moveLocked || !track.draggable) {
490:       this.rendering.setContainerOffsets()
491:       return
492:     }
493: 
494:     const newStartPosition = track.startPosition + delta * this.maxDuration
495:     const minStart = this.options.dragBounds ? 0 : -this.durations[index] - 1
496:     const maxStart = this.maxDuration - this.durations[index]
497: 
498:     if (newStartPosition >= minStart && newStartPosition <= maxStart) {
499:       track.startPosition = newStartPosition
500:       this.initDurations(this.durations)
501:       this.rendering.setContainerOffsets()
502:       this.updatePosition(this.currentTime)
503:       this.emit('start-position-change', { id: track.id, startPosition: newStartPosition })
504:     }
505:   }
506: 
507:   private findCurrentTracks(): number[] {
508:     // Find the audios at the current time
509:     const indexes: number[] = []
510: 
511:     this.tracks.forEach((track, index) => {
512:       const duration = this.durations[index]
513:       if (duration === undefined) return
514: 
515:       if (
516:         (track.url || track.options?.media) &&
517:         this.currentTime >= track.startPosition &&
518:         this.currentTime < track.startPosition + duration
519:       ) {
520:         indexes.push(index)
521:       }
522:     })
523: 
524:     return indexes
525:   }
526: 
527:   private _isPlaying = false;
528: 
529:   private startSync(startAt: number) {
530:     this.startAudioTime = startAt
531:     this.startMultitrackTime = this.currentTime
532: 
533:     const onFrame = () => {
534:       if (!this._isPlaying) return
535: 
536:       const now = this.audioContext.currentTime
537:       // Only start moving the playhead when the scheduled audio start time is reached
538:       // Subtract outputLatency to show what the user is actually hearing
539:       const outputLatency = (this.audioContext as AudioContext & { outputLatency?: number }).outputLatency || 0
540:       const elapsed = Math.max(0, now - this.startAudioTime - outputLatency)
541:       const position = this.startMultitrackTime + elapsed * this.getAudioRate()
542: 
543:       if (Math.abs(position - this.currentTime) > 0.001) {
544:         this.updatePosition(position, true, true)
545:       }
546: 
547:       this.frameRequest = requestAnimationFrame(onFrame)
548:     }
549: 
550:     this.frameRequest = requestAnimationFrame(onFrame)
551:   }
552: 
553:   public play(startTime?: number) {
554:     this._isPlaying = true;
555:     if (this.audioContext && this.audioContext.state === 'suspended') {
556:       this.audioContext.resume()
557:     }
558: 
559:     // Schedule all tracks to start slightly in the future to ensure perfect sync
560:     const startAt = startTime || (this.audioContext ? this.audioContext.currentTime + 0.1 : 0);
561: 
562:     this.startSync(startAt)
563: 
564:     const indexes = this.findCurrentTracks()
565: 
566:     indexes.forEach((index) => {
567:       const audio = this.audios[index] as WebAudioPlayer;
568:       if (audio && typeof audio.playAt === 'function') {
569:         audio.playAt(startAt)
570:       } else if (audio) {
571:         audio.play()
572:       }
573:     })
574:   }
575: 
576:   public pause() {
577:     this._isPlaying = false;
578:     if (this.frameRequest) {
579:       cancelAnimationFrame(this.frameRequest);
580:     }
581:     this.audios.forEach((audio) => audio.pause())
582:   }
583: 
584:   /**
585:    * Gets the current playback rate of the audio tracks.
586:    * @returns The playback rate of the first audio track, or 1 if no tracks exist.
587:    */
588:   public getAudioRate(): number {
589:     return this.audios.length > 0 ? this.audios[0].playbackRate : 1
590:   }
591: 
592:   /**
593:    * Sets the playback rate for all audio tracks to maintain synchronization.
594:    * @param rate The playback rate (between 0.25 and 5.0).
595:    * @throws {Error} If the rate is outside the valid range.
596:    */
597:   public setAudioRate(rate: number) {
598:     if (rate < 0.25 || rate > 5.0) {
599:       throw new Error('Playback rate must be between 0.25 and 5.0')
600:     }
601:     this.audios.forEach((audio) => {
602:       audio.playbackRate = rate
603:     })
604:   }
605: 
606:   public isPlaying() {
607:     return this._isPlaying
608:   }
609: 
610:   public getCurrentTime() {
611:     return this.currentTime
612:   }
613: 
614:   /** Position percentage from 0 to 1 */
615:   public seekTo(position: number) {
616:     this.updatePosition(position * this.maxDuration)
617:   }
618: 
619:   /** Set time in seconds */
620:   public setTime(time: number, autoCenter = false) {

623: 
624:   public setOptions(options: Partial<MultitrackOptions>) {
625:     this.options = { ...this.options, ...options }

629:   }
630: 
631:   public zoom(pxPerSec: number, centerPlayhead = false) {
632:     this.options.minPxPerSec = pxPerSec
633:     this.wavesurfers.forEach((ws, index) => {
634:       if (this.tracks[index].url) {
635:         try {
636:           ws.zoom(pxPerSec);
637:         } catch {
638:           // ignore
639:         }
640:       }
641:     });
642:     this.rendering.setMainWidth(this.durations, this.maxDuration, this.options, this.currentTime)
643:     this.rendering.setContainerOffsets()
644:     this.rendering.updateCursor(this.currentTime / this.maxDuration, false, centerPlayhead)
645:   }
646: 
647:   public setMainWidth(durations: number[], maxDuration: number, options: MultitrackOptions, currentTime?: number) {
648:     this.rendering.setMainWidth(durations, maxDuration, options, currentTime ?? this.currentTime)
649:   }
650: 
651:   public addTrack(track: TrackOptions) {
652:     perfLogger.log(16, track.trackId || track.id);
653:     let index = this.tracks.findIndex((t) => t.id === track.id)
654:     if (index === -1 && track.trackId) {
655:       index = this.tracks.findIndex((t) => t.trackId === track.trackId)
656:     }
657: 
658:     if (index !== -1) {
659:       // Replace existing track
660:       this.tracks[index] = track
661: 
662:       this.initAudio(track).then((audio) => {
663:         this.audios[index] = audio
664:         this.durations[index] = audio.duration
665:         this.initDurations(this.durations)
666:         const container = this.rendering.containers[index]
667:         container.innerHTML = ''
668: 
669:         this.wavesurfers[index].destroy()
670:         this.wavesurfers[index] = this.initWavesurfer(track, index)
671: 
672:         const unsubscribe = initDragging(
673:           container,
674:           (delta: number) => this.onDrag(index, delta),
675:           this.options.rightButtonDrag,
676:         )
677:         this.wavesurfers[index].once('destroy', unsubscribe)
678: 
679:         this.wavesurfers[index].once('ready', () => {
680:           this.emit('canplay')
681:         })
682:       })
683:     } else {
684:       console.warn('multitrack: addTrack could not find track to replace:', track.id)
685:     }
686:   }
687: 
688:   public setRecordingMode(isRecording: boolean) {
689:     this.isRecording = isRecording
690:     this.rendering.setRecordingMode(isRecording)
691:   }
692: 
693:   public destroy() {
694:     if (this.frameRequest) cancelAnimationFrame(this.frameRequest)
695: 
696:     this.rendering.destroy()
697: 
698:     this.audios.forEach((audio) => {
699:       audio.pause()
700:       audio.src = ''
701:       if (audio instanceof WebAudioPlayer) {
702:         audio.destroy()
703:       }
704:     })
705: 
706:     this.wavesurfers.forEach((ws) => {
707:       ws.destroy()
708:     })
709:   }

711:   // See https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLMediaElement/setSinkId
712:   public setSinkId(sinkId: string): Promise<void[]> {
713:     return Promise.all(this.wavesurfers.map((ws) => ws.setSinkId(sinkId)))
714:   }
715: 
716:   public setTrackVolume(index: number, volume: number) {
717:     ;(this.envelopes[index] || this.wavesurfers[index])?.setVolume(volume)
718:   }
719: 
720:   public setTrackStartPosition(index: number, value: number) {
721:     const track = this.tracks[index]
722:     const duration = this.durations[index]
723:     if (!track || duration === undefined) return
724: 
725:     const newStartPosition = value
726:     if (track.startPosition === newStartPosition) return
727: 
728:     const minStart = this.options.dragBounds ? 0 : -duration - 1
729:     const maxStart = this.maxDuration - duration
730: 
731:     if (newStartPosition >= minStart && newStartPosition <= maxStart) {
732:       track.startPosition = newStartPosition

749: function initRendering(tracks: MultitrackTracks, options: MultitrackOptions) {
750:   perfLogger.log(5);
751:   let pxPerSec = options.minPxPerSec || 50
752:   let durations: number[] = []
753:   let mainWidth = 0
754:   let currentOptions = { ...options }
755: 
756:   const getPreRollDuration = () => {
757:     if (currentOptions.preRollDuration !== undefined) return currentOptions.preRollDuration
758:     const bpm = currentOptions.bpm || 120
759:     const beatsPerBar = currentOptions.timeSignature?.[0] || 4
760:     return (60 / bpm) * beatsPerBar
761:   }
762: 
763:   let maxDuration = 1
764: 
765:   // Create a common container for all tracks
766:   const scroll = document.createElement('div')
767:   scroll.className = 'multitrack-scroll-container'
768:   scroll.setAttribute('style', 'width: 100%; overflow-x: scroll; overflow-y: hidden; user-select: none; position: relative;')
769: 
770:   // Initialize scrollLeft immediately if possible
771:   const initialPreRollPixels = getPreRollDuration() * pxPerSec;
772:   scroll.scrollLeft = initialPreRollPixels;
773: 
774:   let isRecording = false;
775: 
776:   scroll.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
777:     if (!isRecording) {
778:       const preRollPixels = getPreRollDuration() * pxPerSec;
779:       if (scroll.scrollLeft < preRollPixels - 1) {
780:         scroll.scrollLeft = preRollPixels;
781:       }
782:     }
783:   });
784: 
785:   const wrapper = document.createElement('div')
786:   wrapper.setAttribute('style', 'position: relative; min-height: 100%;')
787:   scroll.appendChild(wrapper)
788:   options.container.appendChild(scroll)
789: 
790:   // Create a common cursor
791:   const cursor = document.createElement('div')
792:   cursor.setAttribute('style', 'height: 100%; position: absolute; z-index: 10; top: 0; left: 0; pointer-events: none;')
793:   cursor.style.backgroundColor = options.cursorColor || '#000'
794:   cursor.style.width = `${options.cursorWidth ?? 1}px`
795:   wrapper.appendChild(cursor)
796: 
797:   // Create containers for each track
798:   const containers = tracks.map((track, index) => {
799:     const container = document.createElement('div')
800:     container.style.position = 'relative'
801: 
802:     if (track.id === PLACEHOLDER_TRACK.id) {
803:       container.style.display = 'none'
804:     }
805: 
806:     if (options.trackBorderColor && index > 0) {
807:       const borderDiv = document.createElement('div')
808:       borderDiv.setAttribute('style', `width: 100%; height: 2px; background-color: ${options.trackBorderColor}`)
809:       wrapper.appendChild(borderDiv)
810:     }
811: 
812:     if (options.trackBackground && (track.url || track.options?.media)) {
813:       container.style.background = options.trackBackground
814:     }
815: 
816:     // No audio on this track, so make it droppable
817:     if (!(track.url || track.options?.media)) {
818:       const dropArea = document.createElement('div')
819:       dropArea.setAttribute(
820:         'style',
821:         `position: absolute; z-index: 10; left: 10px; top: 10px; right: 10px; bottom: 10px; border: 2px dashed ${options.trackBorderColor};`,
822:       )
823:       dropArea.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
824:         e.preventDefault()
825:         dropArea.style.background = options.trackBackground || ''
826:       })
827:       dropArea.addEventListener('dragleave', (e) => {
828:         e.preventDefault()
829:         dropArea.style.background = ''
830:       })
831:       dropArea.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
832:         e.preventDefault()
833:       })
834:       container.appendChild(dropArea)
835:     }
836: 
837:     wrapper.appendChild(container)
838: 
839:     return container
840:   })
841: 
842:   // Set the positions of each container
843:   const setContainerOffsets = () => {
844:     containers.forEach((container, i) => {
845:       const offset = tracks[i].startPosition * pxPerSec
846:       if (durations[i]) {
847:         container.style.width = `${durations[i] * pxPerSec}px`
848:       }
849:       container.style.transform = `translateX(${offset}px)`
850:     })
851:   }
852: 
853:   return {
854:     containers,
855: 
856:     // Set the start offset
857:     setContainerOffsets,
858: 
859:     // Set the container width
860:     setMainWidth: (trackDurations: number[], maxDurationArg: number, options: MultitrackOptions, currentTime: number) => {
861:       currentOptions = { ...options }
862:       maxDuration = maxDurationArg
863:       durations = trackDurations
864:       pxPerSec = currentOptions.minPxPerSec || 50
865:       mainWidth = pxPerSec * maxDuration
866:       wrapper.style.width = `${mainWidth}px`
867: 
868:       // Set initial scroll to hide pre-roll
869:       const preRollPixels = getPreRollDuration() * pxPerSec;
870:       if (!isRecording && scroll.scrollLeft < preRollPixels) {
871:         scroll.scrollLeft = preRollPixels;
872:       }
873: 
874:       setContainerOffsets()
875: 
876:       // Update cursor position to match new layout
877:       const position = maxDuration > 0 ? currentTime / maxDuration : 0;
878:       cursor.style.left = `${Math.min(100, position * 100)}%`;
879:     },
880: 
881:     // Update cursor position
882:     updateCursor: (position: number, autoCenter: boolean, forceCenter = false) => {
883:       cursor.style.left = `${Math.min(100, position * 100)}%`
884: 
885:       // Update scroll
886:       const { clientWidth, scrollLeft } = scroll
887:       const center = clientWidth / 2
888:       const minScroll = autoCenter ? center : clientWidth
889:       const pos = position * mainWidth
890: 
891:       const preRollPixels = getPreRollDuration() * pxPerSec;
892: 
893:       // If position is in Bar 0 (pre-roll), scrollLeft should be 0
894:       if (position * maxDuration < getPreRollDuration()) {
895:           if (isRecording) {
896:             scroll.scrollLeft = 0;
897:           } else {
898:             scroll.scrollLeft = preRollPixels;
899:           }
900:       } else {
901:           if (forceCenter || pos > scrollLeft + minScroll || pos < scrollLeft) {
902:             const targetScroll = pos - center
903:             scroll.scrollLeft = Math.max(isRecording ? 0 : preRollPixels, targetScroll);
904:           }
905:       }
906:     },
907: 
908:     setOptions: (options: Partial<MultitrackOptions>) => {
909:       currentOptions = { ...currentOptions, ...options }
910:       pxPerSec = currentOptions.minPxPerSec || pxPerSec
911:     },
912: 
913:     setRecordingMode: (recording: boolean) => {
914:       isRecording = recording;
915:       if (!isRecording) {
916:         const preRollPixels = getPreRollDuration() * pxPerSec;
917:         if (scroll.scrollLeft < preRollPixels) {
918:           scroll.scrollLeft = preRollPixels;
919:         }
920:       }
921:     },
922: 
923:     // Click to seek
924:     addClickHandler: (onClick: (position: number) => void) => {
925:       scroll.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
926:         if (maxDuration <= 0) return
927: 
928:         // If we clicked on a phrase or something else that should handle its own click, ignore
929:         if (e.target !== scroll && e.target !== wrapper) {
930:           // Check if target is a child of a track container
931:           let target = e.target as HTMLElement | null;
932:           while (target && target !== wrapper) {
933:             if (target.classList.contains('multitrack-track-container')) {
934:               // If it's a track container but NOT a phrase, we can still seek
935:               if ((e.target as HTMLElement).classList.contains('multitrack-phrase')) return;
936:               break;
937:             }
938:             target = target.parentElement;
939:           }
940:         }
941: 
942:         const rect = wrapper.getBoundingClientRect()
943:         const x = e.clientX - rect.left
944:         let position = x / (wrapper.offsetWidth || 1)
945: 
946:         // Prevent seeking into pre-roll if not recording
947:         if (!isRecording) {
948:           const preRollPixels = getPreRollDuration() * pxPerSec
949:           if (x < preRollPixels - 1) {
950:             position = getPreRollDuration() / maxDuration
951:           }
952:         }
953: 
954:         onClick(Math.max(0, Math.min(1, position)))
955:       })
956:     },
957: 
958:     // Destroy the container
959:     destroy: () => {
960:       scroll.remove()
961:     },
962: 
963:     // Do something on drop
964:     addDropHandler: (onDrop: (trackId: TrackId) => void) => {
965:       tracks.forEach((track, index) => {
966:         if (!(track.url || track.options?.media)) {
967:           const droppable = containers[index].querySelector('div')
968:           droppable?.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
969:             e.preventDefault()
970:             onDrop(track.id)
971:           })
972:         }
973:       })
974:     },
975:   }
976: }
977: 
978: function initDragging(container: HTMLElement, onDrag: (delta: number) => void, rightButtonDrag = false) {
979:   let overallWidth = 0
980: 
981:   const unsubscribe = makeDraggable(
982:     container,
983:     (dx: number) => {
984:       onDrag(dx / overallWidth)
985:     },
986:     () => {
987:       container.style.cursor = 'grabbing'
988:       overallWidth = container.parentElement?.offsetWidth ?? 0
989:     },
990:     () => {
991:       container.style.cursor = 'grab'
992:     },
993:     5,
994:     rightButtonDrag ? 2 : 0,
995:   )
996: 
997:   const preventDefault = (e: Event) => e.preventDefault()
998: 
999:   container.style.cursor = 'grab'
1000: 
1001:   if (rightButtonDrag) {
1002:     container.addEventListener('contextmenu', preventDefault)
1003:   }
1004: 
1005:   return () => {
1006:     container.style.cursor = ''
1007:     unsubscribe()
1008:     if (rightButtonDrag) {
1009:       container.removeEventListener('contextmenu', preventDefault)
1010:     }
1011:   }
1012: }

1: /**
2:  * Web Audio buffer player emulating the behavior of an HTML5 Audio element.
3:  */
4: class WebAudioPlayer {
5:   private audioContext: AudioContext
6:   private gainNode: GainNode
7:   private bufferNode: AudioBufferSourceNode | null = null
8:   private listeners: Map<string, Set<() => void>> = new Map()
9:   private autoplay = false
10:   private playStartTime = 0
11:   private playedDuration = 0
12:   private _src = ''

17:   public paused = true
18:   public crossOrigin: string | null = null
19:   private _anchoredFrame = 0 // Frame offset from UserTime 0 at recording
20:   private _headLength = 1.0 // Head length in seconds (default 1s)
21:   private _id: string = Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 6) // Unique ID for debugging
22: 
23:   constructor(audioContext: AudioContext | null = null, options?: { anchoredFrame?: number; headLength?: number }) {
24:     if (audioContext) {
25:       console.log('WebAudioPlayer constructor: using provided audioContext', audioContext.state);
26:     }
27:     this.audioContext = audioContext || new AudioContext();
28:     console.log('WebAudioPlayer constructor: audioContext ready');
29: 
30:     this.gainNode = this.audioContext.createGain()
31:     this.gainNode.connect(this.audioContext.destination)
32: 
33:     if (options?.anchoredFrame !== undefined) {
34:       this._anchoredFrame = options.anchoredFrame;
35:       console.log('WebAudioPlayer: anchoredFrame set to', this._anchoredFrame);
36:     }

38:       this._headLength = options.headLength;
39:       console.log('WebAudioPlayer: headLength set to', this._headLength);
40:     }
41:   }
42: 
43:   addEventListener(event: string, listener: () => void, options?: { once?: boolean }) {
44:     if (!this.listeners.has(event)) {
45:       this.listeners.set(event, new Set())
46:     }
47:     this.listeners.get(event)?.add(listener)
48: 
49:     if (options?.once) {
50:       const onOnce = () => {
51:         this.removeEventListener(event, onOnce)
52:         this.removeEventListener(event, listener)
53:       }
54:       this.addEventListener(event, onOnce)
55:     }
56:   }
57: 
58:   removeEventListener(event: string, listener: () => void) {
59:     if (this.listeners.has(event)) {
60:       this.listeners.get(event)?.delete(listener)
61:     }
62:   }
63: 
64:   private emitEvent(event: string) {
65:     this.listeners.get(event)?.forEach((listener) => listener())
66:   }
67: 
68:   get src() {
69:     return this._src
70:   }
71: 
72:   set src(value: string) {
73:     this._src = value
74: 
75:     if (!value) {
76:       this.buffer = null
77:       this._duration = 0
78:       this.emitEvent('emptied')
79:       return
80:     }
81: 
82:     fetch(value)
83:       .then((response) => response.arrayBuffer())
84:       .then((arrayBuffer) => {
85:         if (this.src !== value) return null
86:         return this.audioContext.decodeAudioData(arrayBuffer.slice(0))
87:       })
88:       .then((audioBuffer) => {
89:         if (this.src !== value || !audioBuffer) return null
90: 
91:         this.buffer = audioBuffer
92:         this._duration = audioBuffer.duration
93: 
94:         this.emitEvent('loadedmetadata')
95:         this.emitEvent('canplay')
96: 
97:         if (this.autoplay) {
98:           this.play()
99:         }
100:       })
101:   }
102: 
103:   setBuffer(audioBuffer: AudioBuffer) {
104:     this.buffer = audioBuffer
105:     this._duration = audioBuffer.duration
106:     this.emitEvent('loadedmetadata')
107:     this.emitEvent('canplay')
108:     if (this.autoplay) {
109:       this.play()
110:     }
111:   }
112: 
113:   loadBuffer(url: string, audioBuffer: AudioBuffer) {
114:     this._src = url
115:     this.setBuffer(audioBuffer)
116:   }
117: 
118:   getChannelData() {
119:     const channelData = this.buffer?.getChannelData(0)
120:     return channelData ? [new Float32Array(channelData)] : undefined
121:   }
122: 
123:   async play() {
124:     return this.playAt(this.audioContext.currentTime)
125:   }
126: 
127:   private _loop = false
128: 
129:   get loop() {
130:     return this._loop
131:   }
132: 
133:   set loop(value: boolean) {
134:     this._loop = value
135:     if (this.bufferNode) {
136:       this.bufferNode.loop = value
137:     }
138:   }
139: 
140: async playAt(startTime: number) {
141:     if (!this.paused) return
142:     this.paused = false
143: 
144:     this.bufferNode?.disconnect()
145:     this.bufferNode = this.audioContext.createBufferSource()
146:     this.bufferNode.buffer = this.buffer
147:     this.bufferNode.playbackRate.value = this._playbackRate
148:     this.bufferNode.loop = this._loop
149:     this.bufferNode.connect(this.gainNode)
150: 
151:     const duration = this.buffer?.duration || 0
152:     // Play entire buffer from start, advance with playedDuration for seeking
153:     const offset = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.playedDuration, duration - 0.001))
154: 
155:     try {
156:       if (this.buffer) {
157:         if (offset < duration && offset >= 0) {
158:           this.bufferNode.start(startTime, offset)
159:         } else {
160:           // If we are at or past the end, don't start the buffer but emit ended
161:           setTimeout(() => this.emitEvent('ended'), 0)
162:         }
163:       } else if (this._src) {
164:         console.warn('WebAudioPlayer: No buffer to play', { src: this._src })
165:       }
166:     } catch (e) {
167:       console.error('WebAudioPlayer: Error starting bufferNode', e)
168:     }
169: 
170:     this.playStartTime = startTime
171:     this.emitEvent('play')
172:   }
173: 
174:   pause() {
175:     if (this.paused) return
176:     this.paused = true
177: 
178:     try {
179:       this.bufferNode?.stop()
180:     } catch {
181:       // Ignore stop errors
182:     }
183:     this.playedDuration += (this.audioContext.currentTime - this.playStartTime) * this._playbackRate
184:     this.emitEvent('pause')
185:   }
186: 
187:   async setSinkId(deviceId: string) {
188:     const ac = this.audioContext as AudioContext & { setSinkId: (id: string) => Promise<void> }
189:     return ac.setSinkId(deviceId)
190:   }
191: 
192:   get playbackRate() {
193:     return this._playbackRate
194:   }
195:   set playbackRate(value) {
196:     if (!this.paused) {
197:       this.playedDuration += (this.audioContext.currentTime - this.playStartTime) * this._playbackRate
198:       this.playStartTime = this.audioContext.currentTime
199:     }
200:     this._playbackRate = value
201:     if (this.bufferNode) {
202:       this.bufferNode.playbackRate.value = value
203:     }
204:   }
205: 
206:   get currentTime() {
207:     const time = this.paused ? this.playedDuration : this.playedDuration + (this.audioContext.currentTime - this.playStartTime) * this._playbackRate
208:     return Math.max(0, time)
209:   }
210:   set currentTime(value) {
211:     this.emitEvent('seeking')
212: 
213:     if (this.paused) {
214:       this.playedDuration = value
215:     } else {
216:       this.pause()
217:       this.playedDuration = value
218:       this.play()
219:     }
220: 
221:     this.emitEvent('timeupdate')
222:   }
223: 
224:   get duration() {
225:     return this._duration
226:   }
227:   set duration(value: number) {
228:     this._duration = value
229:   }
230: 
231:   get volume() {
232:     return this.gainNode.gain.value
233:   }
234:   set volume(value) {
235:     this.gainNode.gain.value = value
236:     this.emitEvent('volumechange')
237:   }
238: 
239:   get muted() {
240:     return this._muted
241:   }
242:   set muted(value: boolean) {
243:     if (this._muted === value) return
244:     this._muted = value
245: 
246:     if (this._muted) {
247:       this.gainNode.disconnect()
248:     } else {
249:       // Only reconnect if not already connected
250:       if (!this.gainNode.context?.destination) {
251:         this.gainNode.connect(this.audioContext.destination)
252:       }
253:     }
254:   }
255: 
256:   destroy() {
257:     this.pause()
258:     this.gainNode.disconnect()
259:     this.bufferNode?.disconnect()
260:     this.listeners.clear()
261:   }
262: }
263: 
264: export default WebAudioPlayer

(End of file - total 264 lines)
</content>

201: export const useStore = create<AppState>()(

212:         ],
213:         cues: [],

217:         currentTime: 0,

219:         selectedTrackId: null,

222: 
223:         setAppMode: (mode) => set({ appMode: mode }),
224:         setLyricsText: (text) => set({ lyricsText: text }),
225:         setLyricsSegments: (segments) => set({ lyricsSegments: segments }),
226:         setLyricsViewMode: (mode) => set({ lyricsViewMode: mode }),
227:         setActiveColorId: (colorId) => set({ activeColorId: colorId }),
228: 
229:         setMoveLocked: (locked) => set({ moveLocked: locked }),
230:         setEnvelopeLocked: (locked) => set({ envelopeLocked: locked }),
231:         setRawRecordingMode: (mode) => set({ rawRecordingMode: mode }),
232:         setHeadLength: (length) => set({ headLength: Math.max(0, Math.min(1, length)) }),
233:         setSampleRate: (rate) => set({ sampleRate: rate }),
234:         setPreRollMode: (mode) => set({ preRollMode: mode }),
235:         setWaveformQuality: (quality) => set({ waveformQuality: quality }),
236:         setIsReady: (isReady) => set({ isReady }),
237:         setResponsiveLayout: (layout) => set(layout),
238:         setToolbarProposal: (toolbarProposal) => set({ toolbarProposal }),
239:         setToolbarVisibleLabels: (toolbarVisibleLabels) => set({ toolbarVisibleLabels }),
240:         reorderTracks: (startIndex, endIndex) => set((state) => {
241:           const [removed] = state.tracks.splice(startIndex, 1);
242:           state.tracks.splice(endIndex, 0, removed);
243:         }),
244:         resetSettings: () => set({ ...defaultSettings }),
245:         
246:         addTrack: (track) => set((state) => {
247:           state.tracks.push({ ...track, id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9) });
248:         }),
249:         updateTrack: (id, updates) => set((state) => {
250:           const track = state.tracks.find(t => t.id === id);
251:           if (track) Object.assign(track, updates);
252:         }),
253:         removeTrack: (id) => set((state) => {
254:           state.tracks = state.tracks.filter(t => t.id !== id);
255:         }),
256:         
257:         addPhrase: (trackId, phrase) => set((state) => {
258:           const track = state.tracks.find(t => t.id === trackId);
259:           if (track) {
260:             const takeNumber = track.phrases.length + 1;
261:             const newPhrase = { 
262:               ...phrase, 
263:               id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
264:               name: `Take ${takeNumber}`
265:             };
266:             track.phrases.push(newPhrase);
267:             // FIXED: Update track.anchoredFrame so multitrack can use it
268:             if (newPhrase.anchoredFrame !== undefined) {
269:               track.anchoredFrame = newPhrase.anchoredFrame;
270:               console.log('store: set track.anchoredFrame =', newPhrase.anchoredFrame, 'for track', trackId);
271:             } else if (phrase.anchoredFrame !== undefined) {
272:               track.anchoredFrame = phrase.anchoredFrame;
273:               console.log('store: set track.anchoredFrame =', phrase.anchoredFrame, 'for track', trackId, '(from phrase)');
274:             }
275:           }
276:         }),
277:         updatePhrase: (trackId, phraseId, updates) => set((state) => {
278:           const track = state.tracks.find(t => t.id === trackId);
279:           if (track) {
280:             const phrase = track.phrases.find(p => p.id === phraseId);
281:             if (phrase) Object.assign(phrase, updates);
282:           }
283:         }),
284:         updatePhrasePosition: (trackId, phraseId, position) => set((state) => {
285:           const track = state.tracks.find(t => t.id === trackId);
286:           if (!track) return;
287:           
288:           const phrase = track.phrases.find(p => p.id === phraseId);
289:           if (!phrase) return;
290:           
291:           const oldPosition = phrase.startPosition;
292:           const newPosition = Math.max(0, position);
293:           const delta = newPosition - oldPosition;
294:           
295:           if (Math.abs(delta) < 0.0001) return;
296: 
297:           phrase.startPosition = newPosition;
298:           // FIXED: Recalculate anchoredFrame relative to new position to preserve sync
299:           // anchoredFrame represents the frame offset from UserTime 0
300:           // When the clip moves, we need to update anchoredFrame so audio still lines up
301:           // new anchoredFrame = originalAnchoredFrame + (newPosition - originalStartPosition) * sampleRate
302:           // But since we want relative shift: deltaFrames = deltaPosition * sampleRate
303:           if (phrase.originalAnchoredFrame !== undefined && phrase.originalAnchoredFrame !== 0) {
304:             const sampleRate = get().sampleRate || 44100;
305:             const deltaFrames = Math.round(delta * sampleRate);
306:             phrase.anchoredFrame = phrase.originalAnchoredFrame + deltaFrames;
307:             console.log('store: updated anchoredFrame for moved phrase:', phrase.anchoredFrame, '(delta:', delta, ')');
308:           }
309:           // Shift envelope nodes that are within the phrase's time range
310:           track.envelope.forEach(node => {
311:             if (node.time >= oldPosition - 0.01 && node.time <= oldPosition + phrase.duration + 0.01) {
312:               node.time = Math.max(0, node.time + delta);
313:             }
314:           });
315:         }),
316:         shiftAllPhrases: (amount, exceptPhraseId) => set((state) => {
317:           state.tracks.forEach(t => {
318:             t.phrases.forEach(p => {
319:               if (p.id !== exceptPhraseId) {
320:                 p.startPosition = Math.max(0, p.startPosition + amount);
321:               }
322:             });
323:           });
324:         }),
325:         removePhrase: (trackId, phraseId) => set((state) => {
326:           const track = state.tracks.find(t => t.id === trackId);
327:           if (track) {
328:             track.phrases = track.phrases.filter(p => p.id !== phraseId);
329:           }
330:         }),
331:         
332:         addCue: (cue) => set((state) => {
333:           state.cues.push({ ...cue, id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9) });
334:           state.cues.sort((a, b) => a.time - b.time);
335:         }),
336:         updateCue: (id, updates) => set((state) => {
337:           const cue = state.cues.find(c => c.id === id);
338:           if (cue) Object.assign(cue, updates);
339:           state.cues.sort((a, b) => a.time - b.time);
340:         }),
341:         removeCue: (id) => set((state) => {
342:           state.cues = state.cues.filter(c => c.id !== id);
343:         }),
344:         
345:         addEnvelopeNode: (trackId, node) => set((state) => {
346:           const track = state.tracks.find(t => t.id === trackId);
347:           if (track) {
348:             track.envelope.push({ ...node, id: node.id || Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9) } as EnvelopeNode);
349:             track.envelope.sort((a, b) => a.time - b.time);
350:           }
351:         }),
352:         updateEnvelopeNode: (trackId, nodeId, updates) => set((state) => {
353:           const track = state.tracks.find(t => t.id === trackId);
354:           if (track) {
355:             const node = track.envelope.find(n => n.id === nodeId);
356:             if (node) Object.assign(node, updates);
357:             track.envelope.sort((a, b) => a.time - b.time);
358:           }
359:         }),
360:         removeEnvelopeNode: (trackId, nodeId) => set((state) => {
361:           const track = state.tracks.find(t => t.id === trackId);
362:           if (track) {
363:             track.envelope = track.envelope.filter(n => n.id !== nodeId);
364:           }
365:         }),
366:         
367:         setBpm: (bpm) => set({ bpm }),
368:         setTimeSignature: (timeSignature) => set({ timeSignature }),
369:         setIsPlaying: (isPlaying) => set({ isPlaying }),
370:         setIsRecording: (isRecording) => set({ isRecording }),
371:         setCurrentTime: (currentTime) => set({ currentTime }),
372:         setDuration: (duration) => set({ duration }),
373:         setZoom: (zoom) => set({ zoom }),
374:         setGlobalLatencyMs: (globalLatencyMs) => set({ globalLatencyMs }),
375:         setExtraLatencyMs: (extraLatencyMs) => set({ extraLatencyMs }),
376:         setSelectedTrackId: (selectedTrackId) => set({ selectedTrackId }),
377:         setSelectedPhraseId: (selectedPhraseId) => set({ selectedPhraseId }),
378:         setSyncLoop: (syncLoop) => set({ syncLoop }),
379:         
380:         setSmallBtnSize: (size) => set({ smallBtnSize: size }),
381:         setMediumBtnSize: (size) => set({ mediumBtnSize: size }),
382:         setLargeBtnSize: (size) => set({ largeBtnSize: size }),
383:         
384:         getMultitrackTime: () => 0,
385:         setMultitrackTimeGetter: (getter) => set({ getMultitrackTime: getter }),
386:         seekTo: undefined,
387:         setSeekTo: (fn) => set({ seekTo: fn }),
388: 
389:         saveProject: async () => {
390:           const state = get();
391:           const projectData = {
392:             tracks: state.tracks,
393:             cues: state.cues,
394:             bpm: state.bpm,
395:             timeSignature: state.timeSignature,
396:             globalLatencyMs: state.globalLatencyMs,
397:           };
398:           try {
399:             await localforage.setItem('awnn_project', projectData);
400:             alert('Project saved successfully!');
401:           } catch (err) {
402:             console.error('Error saving project:', err);
403:             alert('Failed to save project.');
404:           }
405:         },
406: 
407:         loadProject: async () => {
408:           try {
409:             const projectData = await localforage.getItem<ProjectData>('awnn_project');
410:             if (projectData) {
411:               // Recreate object URLs for blobs
412:               const tracksWithUrls = projectData.tracks.map((t: Track) => {
413:                 const updatedPhrases = t.phrases?.map((p, index) => {
414:                   if (p.blob) {
415:                     return { 
416:                       ...p, 
417:                       url: URL.createObjectURL(p.blob),
418:                       name: p.name || `Take ${index + 1}`
419:                     };
420:                   }
421:                   return {
422:                     ...p,
423:                     name: p.name || `Take ${index + 1}`
424:                   };
425:                 }) || [];
426:                 return { ...t, phrases: updatedPhrases };
427:               });
428: 
429:               // Ensure metronome track exists
430:               let finalTracks = tracksWithUrls;
431:               if (!finalTracks.some((t: Track) => t.id === 'metronome')) {
432:                 finalTracks = [
433:                   { id: 'metronome', name: 'Metronome', color: '#718096', isMuted: false, isSolo: false, volume: 1, pan: 0, offset: 0, phrases: [], envelope: [] },
434:                   ...finalTracks
435:                 ];
436:               }
437: 
438:               set((state) => {
439:                 state.tracks = finalTracks;
440:                 state.cues = projectData.cues || [];
441:                 state.bpm = projectData.bpm || 120;
442:                 state.timeSignature = projectData.timeSignature || [4, 4];
443:                 state.globalLatencyMs = projectData.globalLatencyMs || 0;
444:               });
445:               alert('Project loaded successfully!');
446:             } else {
447:               alert('No saved project found.');
448:             }
449:           } catch (err) {
450:             console.error('Error loading project:', err);
451:             alert('Failed to load project.');
452:           }
453:         },
454:       })
455:     ),
456:     {
457:       name: 'awnn-settings',
458:       partialize: (state) => ({
459:         bpm: state.bpm,
460:         timeSignature: state.timeSignature,
461:         zoom: state.zoom,
462:         globalLatencyMs: state.globalLatencyMs,
463:         moveLocked: state.moveLocked,
464:         envelopeLocked: state.envelopeLocked,
465:         rawRecordingMode: state.rawRecordingMode,
466:         preRollMode: state.preRollMode,
467:         waveformQuality: state.waveformQuality,
468:         appMode: state.appMode,
469:         lyricsText: state.lyricsText,
470:         lyricsSegments: state.lyricsSegments,
471:         lyricsViewMode: state.lyricsViewMode,
472:         activeColorId: state.activeColorId,
473:         toolbarProposal: state.toolbarProposal,
474:         toolbarVisibleLabels: state.toolbarVisibleLabels,
475:       }),
476:     }
477:   )
478: );

5: export const SyncTool: React.FC = () => {

11:     updatePhrase,
